archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Adapted for High-End Developer Tools
core_philosophy: Provide a premium, precise, and transparent 'control room' experience for database querying using Glassmorphism over a dark, moody background.

headings.instruction: Use Outfit for all Headings (H1-H6). Do NOT use Inter, Space Grotesk, Roboto, or generic sans-serif fonts for headings.

body.instruction: Use Work Sans for all standard body text, buttons, and UI labels.

monospace.instruction: Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for generated MongoDB queries, JSON output, and schema definitions.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Bento Grid. 1-col on mobile, 12-col on desktop. Sidebar spans 3 cols, main chat/results spans 9 cols.
layout_and_spacing.generous_spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 inside glass panels to prevent text from colliding with borders. Increase gap between sections to gap-8 or gap-12.
layout_and_spacing.optical_alignment: Left-align dense content like queries and schema lists. Center-align empty states or welcome messages.

glassmorphism_rules.interactive_cards: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
glassmorphism_rules.text_contrast: Ensure text over glass panels uses bright, high-contrast colors (like #F8FAFC) to remain readable against complex backgrounds.

components.name: Sidebar (Schema Viewer & History)
components.styling: Fixed left sidebar using 'base_panels' glassmorphism. Use subtle dividing lines (border-white/5) between schema collections.

components.name: Chat Interface
components.styling: Main central area. User messages are right-aligned with amber accent background (bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-50 border border-amber-500/30). AI responses are left-aligned using 'base_panels'.

components.name: Query Input Field
components.styling: A floating glass input at the bottom. bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-4 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500/50 outline-none.

components.name: Query Results Display (Tables)
components.styling: Rendered inside the chat as a glass card. Table headers are text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400. Rows have subtle border-b border-white/5.

components.name: Generated MongoDB Query Preview
components.styling: A dedicated dark glass block within the AI response. bg-black/60 border border-white/10 p-4 rounded-xl font-mono text-sm text-green-400 overflow-x-auto.

background_image.description: Abstract bright orange shining lights behind blurred window in darkness. Set this as the absolute positioned, full-screen background object with a dark overlay (bg-black/60) to let the glassmorphism panels refract the glowing orange and dark tones.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react (already installed). Keep icons minimalist with stroke-width 1.5. Tint icons to match the text color (e.g., text-slate-400 or text-amber-500).

animations.entrance: Staggered fade-in for chat messages. Use simple opacity/transform transitions.

testing.instruction: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'submit-query-button', 'schema-collection-item', 'chat-message-ai').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: Outfit, Work Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Do NOT use HTML native date/select inputs. Use custom UI or shadcn equivalents if needed, but styling must adhere strictly to the glassmorphism rules provided.
Place the 'background_image' from media behind the entire application with a fixed, cover positioning and an overlay of bg-black/60.
Apply 'data-testid' to EVERYTHING interactive: sidebar, chat messages, input form, table rows.
Ensure 'glassmorphism_rules' are applied to major layout blocks (Sidebar, Chat Area, Results Card).
